brief_html: Battle.net requests required work from the Client using this message. See ExtraWork document for more details.
remarks_html:
Battle.net requests required work from the Client using this message. See ExtraWork document for more details.

Using C>S 0x33 SID_GETFILETIME with request ID 0x80000006, the client should download the specified MPQ file, extract ExtraWork.dll and call the ExtraWork function inside of it.
